zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Wistowe於1442年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾沙爾斯同時，她的父親John Wistowe of Drayton22歲，母親Allison Jon of Peatling22歲。她於1471年與John Purefoy在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年2月18日在英國享年105歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾分尼 德雷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Wistowe于1442年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾沙爾斯同时，她的父亲John Wistowe of Drayton22岁，母亲Allison Jon of Peatling22岁。她于1471年与John Purefoy在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1547年2月18日在英国享年105岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾分尼 德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wistowe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wistow (Hunts, WR Yorks) or Westow (ER Yorks); the latter was recorded as Wystowe in 1365.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Wistowe was born in 1442, in Shalstone, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, John Wistowe of Drayton, was 22 and her mother, Allison Jon of Peatling, was 22. She married John Purefoy in 1471, in Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 18 February 1547, in England, at the age of 105, and was buried in Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Wistowe est née en 1442, à Shalstone, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Wistowe of Drayton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Allison Jon of Peatling, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Purefoy en 1471, à Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 février 1547, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 105 ans, et a été enterrée à Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Fenny Drayton, Hinckley and Bosworth Bor: Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Wistowe 1442 in Shalstone, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wistowe of Drayton 22 und ihre Mutter Allison Jon of Peatling 22. Sie hat 1471 in Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom John Purefoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Februar 1547 im Alter von 105 Jahren in England und wurde in Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John Purefoy nel 1471, nel Drayton, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joan Wistoweが1442年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアシャルストーンで生まれた時，父John Wistowe of Draytonは22歳，母Allison Jon of Peatlingは22歳であった。1471年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアドレイトンでJohn Purefoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1547年2月18日にイギリスで105歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアフエニー ドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Wistowe(이)가 1442년 영국 벅잉함실르 샤스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wistowe of Drayton(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Allison Jon of Peatling(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 드라이턴에서 John Purefoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 2월 18일 영국에서 105세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 펜이 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wistowe nasceu em 1442, em Shalstone, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wistowe of Drayton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Allison Jon of Peatling, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Purefoy em 1471, em Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1547, em Inglaterra, com 105 anos, e foi sepultada em Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Fenny Drayton, Hinckley and Bosworth Bor: Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Wistowe родилась в 1442 г. в местности шолстоун, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Wistowe of Drayton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Allison Jon of Peatling, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Purefoy в 1471 г. в местности дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 февраля 1547 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 105 лет и была похоронена в местности фенни дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
